Vera Bradley cancels current shareholder rights plan.

data.title: SEALSQ Announces Agenda of its 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: SEALSQ Corp, a company specializing in Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology products, will host its 2025 Annual General Meeting for shareholders on May 7, 2026, at 09:00 a.m. EST in Miami, FL. The meeting will be held at WeWork Office Space, Wynwood Garage, located at 360 NW 27th St, 33127. SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) is excited about the upcoming gathering, offering shareholders the opportunity to participate in crucial decisions and discussions.

data.title: VALUE LINE, INC. DIVIDEND HAS JUST BEEN RAISED FROM $1.30 TO $1.40 (ANNUALIZED) – ITS 12TH CONSECUTIVE INCREASE
data.description: On April 17, 2026, Value Line, Inc. (NASDAQ: VALU) disclosed an upsurge in its quarterly dividend to $0.35 per common share ($1.40 annually) following a decision by the Board of Directors. The enhanced cash dividend will be distributed on May 12, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 27, 2026. This adjustment marks a 7.7% rise and signifies the 12th consecutive year of dividend growth for Value Line.
NASDAQ 100 extends rally to 13 days, longest streak since 2013.

data.title: Xilio Therapeutics Announces New Preclinical Data at AACR Annual Meeting for XTX601, a Masked T Cell Engager Targeting CLDN18.2
data.description: In various preclinical models, XTX601 has shown tumor-selective activation dependent on protease, along with strong anti-tumor effects.

data.title: Adagene Presents Two Posters at AACR 2026 with New Data Highlighting Muzastotug’s Potential as a Backbone Combination Therapy for Multiple Tumor Types
data.description: In a Phase 1b/2 trial for patients with locally advanced or metastatic/unresectable hepatocellular carcinoma, a triple combination of muzastotug, atezolizumab, and bevacizumab showed significantly higher overall response rates (ORR) of 66.7% compared to the 32.5% ORR of the atezolizumab + bevacizumab control arm as per HCC-specific Modified RECIST v1.1 by Investigator.

data.title: Cardiff Oncology Presents Preclinical Data on its PLK1 Inhibitor Onvansertib in Combination with a HER2-Targeted ADC at the 2026 AACR Annual Meeting
data.description: The combination of Onvansertib with trastuzumab deruxtecan showed increased antitumor effectiveness in HER2-low breast cancer models, leading to tumor regression and apoptosis. This suggests promise for patients with few treatment choices.

data.title: New Era Energy & Digital Announces Appointment of Andy Casazza as Chief Corporate Officer
data.description: On April 17, 2026, in Midland, Texas, New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (Nasdaq: NUAI) revealed the appointment of Andy Casazza as Chief Corporate Officer. New Era specializes in digital infrastructure and power assets in the Permian Basin. Casazza will assume the role on April 28, 2026.

data.title: New Clinical and Preclinical Data for Investigational Candidate Zidesamtinib Presented at AACR Annual Meeting 2026
data.description: In the ARROS-1 trial, a subset of ROS1-positive NSCLC patients who had been previously treated with repotrectinib or taletrectinib showed significant clinical benefits when treated with Zidesamtinib. This included patients with CNS disease or ROS1 resistance mutations. Preclinical data further reinforce the effectiveness of Zidesamtinib in this population.

data.title: Kalohexis Announces Poster Presentation at the American Association for Cancer Research Annual Meeting 2026
data.description: On April 17, 2026, in Northbrook, Illinois, Kalohexis, a biotechnology company in the clinical stage, disclosed their use of the melanocortin system to revolutionize metabolic disease treatment, initially focusing on obesity and cancer cachexia. They revealed a poster presentation at the American conference.

data.title: Aviation Capital Group Announces Departure of Chief Financial Officer
data.description: In Newport Beach, California, Aviation Capital Group LLC (ACG) revealed that Craig Segor will resign from his position as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer on May 31, 2026. The company expressed gratitude for his service.

data.title: Revolution Medicines Announces Closing of Concurrent Upsized Public Offerings with Aggregate Gross Proceeds of Approximately $2.2 Billion, Including Full Exercise of Underwriters’ Option to Purchase Additional Shares
data.description: In a recent press release from Redwood City, California, Revolution Medicines, Inc. (Nasdaq: RVMD), a company focused on developing targeted therapies for patients with RAS-addicted cancers, announced the successful completion of its public offerings. The company sold 12,147,887 shares of common stock at $142.00 per share, along with $500.0 million in 0.50% convertible senior notes due 2033. This includes 1,584,506 shares issued through the underwriters' full exercise of their option to purchase additional shares. The total gross proceeds from the offerings amounted to roughly $2,225.0 million.

data.title: The Iran War Went Pretty Much As History Predicted For Stock Market. What's Next?
data.description: The sequence of events during the conflict in Iran aligned with past market responses to significant geopolitical occurrences. The outcome of the Iran war mirrored historical trends observed in the stock market. What will be the next steps following these developments?

data.title: Here Are The Biggest Losers From Oil Stock Rout
data.description: Following Iran's announcement that it will reopen the Strait of Hormuz, oil stocks plummeted. This news had a significant impact on the market, with many investors feeling the effects of the oil stock rout. The reopening of the Strait of Hormuz caused a considerable drop in oil prices, leading to notable losses for major oil companies. The situation continues to evolve, with investors closely monitoring the developments in the oil market. This development serves as a reminder of the interconnected nature of global markets and the influence of geopolitical events on stock performance.

data.title: Tranchi AI Introduces AI  to Support Buying Homes
data.description: On April 17, 2026, in San Diego, Tranchi AI, a company specializing in AI and mortgage technology, unveiled enhancements to its platform to assist with rental property sourcing, analysis, and transaction preparation. These updates align with advancements in the utilization of artificial intelligence in the real estate sector.

data.title: VIPs Entertainment Launches New Booking Platform for Live Bands, DJs, and Custom Event Entertainment
data.description: An esteemed live event entertainment agency is revolutionizing the process for booking live bands for various occasions, including weddings, corporate events, and upscale celebrations. Operating in three U.S. cities and spanning six countries, VIPs Entertainment is at the forefront of providing top-tier entertainment services. On April 17, 2026, in Los Angeles, the agency announced its commitment to simplifying the hiring process for clients.

data.title: Laurent C.A. Melchior Tellier Returns to Original Role as CEO of Genomic Prediction
data.description: On April 17, 2026, in Newark, New Jersey, Genomic Prediction, Inc., a prominent company specializing in advanced genetic testing and reproductive genomics, revealed that its original CEO, Laurent C.A. Melchior Tellier, has resumed his position as chief executive officer. This move marks a significant development for the company as it navigates the cutting-edge field of genetic technologies.
